summary: Scrutiny for core-session-state-refactor was overridden because the only failing validator remained the documented pre-existing packages/edge-worker screenshot-upload-hooks suite, which is unrelated to the core session/persistence refactor. Typecheck and lint passed, and the milestone features had targeted green tests plus downstream edge-worker typechecks.

test.details: pnpm test:packages:run -- --maxWorkers=8 fails in packages/edge-worker/test/EdgeWorker.screenshot-upload-hooks.test.ts with existing undefined screenshot hook matcher expectations.

override.reason: Mission AGENTS.md documents the screenshot-upload-hooks suite as pre-existing unrelated edge-worker validation noise. The core milestone changed core session/public types and persistence, validated those changes with targeted core tests, migration coverage, lint, and downstream edge-worker typechecks, so scrutiny review is safe to defer past this unrelated baseline failure.
